description: Collect badges by navigating Sydney's tightest learner-friendly streets. Supervisor confirms each first completion.

pedestrian_only_nearby.name: Suez Canal
pedestrian_only_nearby.note: Pedestrian laneway only — do not drive.

pedestrian_only_nearby.name: McElhone Place (Cat Alley)
pedestrian_only_nearby.note: Closed to through traffic — walk only.

streets.name: Chaleyer Street
streets.description: Tight residential street with parked cars both sides.
streets.supervisor_notes: Practise giving way to oncoming traffic; use mirrors and slow speed.

streets.name: Shadforth Street
streets.description: Heritage terrace street that often feels like a single-lane two-way corridor.
streets.supervisor_notes: Avoid peak hour first time. Sharp turn from Oxford Street needs extra care.

streets.name: Gipps Street
streets.description: Narrow Paddington terrace street near Victoria Barracks.
streets.supervisor_notes: Watch for pedestrians and door openings from parked cars.

streets.name: William Street
streets.description: Narrow inner-east connector with shops and terraces near Oxford Street.
streets.supervisor_notes: High pedestrian activity; practise scanning and low-speed positioning.

streets.name: Atherden Street
streets.description: Sydney's shortest street (~28 m) — intimate heritage terrace enclosure.
streets.supervisor_notes: Short segment; good for controlled slow approach and tight positioning.

streets.name: Carlotta Road
streets.description: Residential rat-run with tight parking and limited visibility from driveways.
streets.supervisor_notes: Check blind spots when cars are tightly parked; expect oncoming traffic.

streets.name: William Street
streets.description: Village-scale street connecting Double Bay's busy core.
streets.supervisor_notes: Awkward junction near Beach Street — practise gap selection.

streets.name: Norwich Lane
streets.description: Genuine lane width typical of Rose Bay back streets.
streets.supervisor_notes: Good paired practice with Chaleyer Street for the Rose Bay Squeeze badge.

streets.name: Drumalbyn Road
streets.description: Pinch point near parked cars — real give-way and creep-forward practice.
streets.supervisor_notes: Use the western side near nos. 87–89 where the road narrows.

streets.name: Argyle Lane
streets.description: One of Sydney's narrowest driveable streets (~2.4 m kerb to kerb). Boss-level unlock.
streets.supervisor_notes: Daylight only. Small car recommended. Skip if uncomfortable — this is optional expert tier.

honourable_mentions.name: Liverpool Street
honourable_mentions.note: Pairs with Shadforth; same congestion character.

honourable_mentions.name: Lance Lane
honourable_mentions.note: Twin of Argyle Lane (2.4 m) — optional expert bonus.

honourable_mentions.name: Military Road
honourable_mentions.note: Village centre; tourists and tight kerbs near the wharf.

honourable_mentions.name: Hopetoun Avenue
honourable_mentions.note: Narrow and steep — combine with Hill Start Hero collection.

_meta.coordinate_note: Bounding boxes are approximate for v1. Verify on-site before production.
_meta.name_correction: Chaleyer Street (Rose Bay) is often misheard as Charlie Street.
